title: 2013 London Broncos season

{{Use British English|date=May 2014}} {{Use dmy dates|date=April 2026}} {{Infobox rugby league team season | year = 2013 | team_colour = black | font_colour = #99FFFF; border:solid #99FFFF 1px | league = Super League | league_link = [[Super League XVIII]] | league_rank = 13th | league_wins = 5 | league_draws = 2 | league_losses = 20 | points_for = 565 | points_against = 1054 | playoff_result = | cup = Challenge Cup | cup_result = Semi-final | cup_wins = 3 | cup_losses = 1 | CEO_title = Chairman | CEO = [[David Hughes (executive)|David Hughes]] | coach_title = Head Coach | coach = [[Tony Rea]] | captain = [[Craig Gower]]
[[Tony Clubb]] | stadium = [[Twickenham Stoop]] | avg_attendance = 2,380 | high_attendance = 6,274 | top_tries = [[Kieran Dixon]] - 21 | top_goals = [[Michael Witt]] - 52 | top_points = Michael Witt - 130 | pattern_la1 = | pattern_b1 = _thinskycollar | pattern_ra1 = | pattern_sh1 = _lightblue stripes | pattern_so1 = _sky_blue_on_top | leftarm1 = 000000 | body1 = 000000 | rightarm1 = 000000 | shorts1 = 000000 | socks1 = 000000 | pattern_la2 = | pattern_b2 = _blackcollar | pattern_ra2 = | pattern_sh2 = _lightblue stripes | pattern_so2 = _blacktop | leftarm2 = 76D7EA | body2 = 76D7EA | rightarm2 = 76D7EA | shorts2 = 000000 | socks2 = 76D7EA | prev_season = [[2012 London Broncos season|2012]] | next_season = [[2014 London Broncos season|2014]] | list = yes | list_link = List of London Broncos seasons }} The '''2013 London Broncos season''' was the thirty-fourth in the club's history and their eighteenth season in the [[Super League]]. Competing in [[Super League XVIII]], the club was coached by [[Tony Rea]], finishing in 13th place and reaching the Semi-finals of the [[2013 Challenge Cup]]. It was the 18th season of the [[Super League]] era and their second since returning to the London Broncos name. They came within one match of the Challenge Cup final but finished the Super League season in second to last place. ==2013 milestones== *In August 2012 [[Tony Rea]] was named the Bronco's coach for the 2013 season, after serving in a caretaker capacity in the second half of the 2012 season.[http://www.rleague.com/content/article.php?id=45230 Tony Rea named permanent London coach] {{webarchive
